# Samooh

> Samooh (समूह) is a curated community for founders, makers, and builders of Indian origin working on world-class products for a global audience.

Samooh — pronounced "sa-moo" — means "a gathering or assembly of people" in Hindi and Sanskrit. It is a private, invitation-only community founded by Ivan Mehta and Amrith Shanbhag. Membership is selective and focused on quality: Samooh brings together Indian-origin founders, engineers, designers, operators, and investors who are building or have built products that matter globally, not just within India.

The community is built on trust and craft. It exists to give Indian-origin builders a supportive network of peers who have been through the journey of building global products and are willing to pay it forward.

## What Samooh Is

- A curated, invitation-only community for Indian-origin founders, makers, and builders
- Focused on people building or scaling world-class products for global audiences
- Founded by Ivan Mehta (Tech Reporter, TechCrunch) and Amrith Shanbhag (Community & Growth, Ally by Envision)
- Based online, with members spread across India, the US, Europe, and beyond
- Not a networking group or directory — a tight-knit peer community

## What Samooh Is Not

- Not open to everyone — membership is curated and by invitation
- Not India-market focused — members build for global audiences
- Not a jobs board, investor network, or accelerator
- Not a Discord or Slack community (private by design)

## How to Apply

Applications are open at https://samooh.com/apply. Samooh is looking for Indian-origin founders, builders, and makers who are working on products that matter globally — or are clearly on their way there.

## Members

Samooh currently has 25 members. Each member has a public profile page at https://samooh.com/{first-name}.

### Founders of Samooh

- **Ivan Mehta** — Tech Reporter at TechCrunch covering global consumer tech; previously at The Next Web and Huffington Post; based in India. https://samooh.com/ivan
- **Amrith Shanbhag** — Community & Growth at Ally by Envision; previously led community and social at Product Hunt; worked with Opal, Stoic, and other consumer startups; based in Amsterdam. https://samooh.com/amrith

### Full Member List

- **Kishan Bagaria** — Co-founder of Beeper (acquired by Automattic), an all-in-one messenger consolidating iMessage, WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, Discord, and Slack. https://samooh.com/kishan
- **Dravisha Katoch** — Storyteller, community builder, and investor at Antler India; building Before Day Zero; expertise in healthtech, sports tech, and consumer fintech. https://samooh.com/dravisha
- **Harshil Shah** — Indie iOS engineer; built Pause, Stopwatch, and RIFF; currently building Peak, a personal fitness dashboard. https://samooh.com/harshil
- **Himanshu Khanna** — Founder of Openvy (a creative network for pop culture) and Sparklin (one of India's leading design agencies). https://samooh.com/himanshu
- **Gaana Srinivas** — Senior product designer; previously at Pleo, Rune (YC), Amazon, and GOODIEBOX; also an illustrator and photographer. https://samooh.com/gaana
- **Jaiya Gill** — Marketing Lead at Carry; writes the girlsplains newsletter at the intersection of startups, tech, money, and pop culture; previously worked on MrBeast's TikTok strategy. https://samooh.com/jaiya
- **Sai Kambampati** — Founder of Second Nature Computing; previously at Humane working on the Ai Pin interaction model; 3× WWDC Scholar; interned at Apple and Disney. https://samooh.com/sai
- **Ishika Mukerji** — Senior PM at Morphic leading product and BD; runs a podcast on Base and Farcaster; background in electrical/computer engineering at Rutgers. https://samooh.com/ishika
- **Kanishka Chaudhry** — Software engineer at Upstox; 2× WWDC Scholar; previously at Structured and Blinkit; led a Hack Club at her high school. https://samooh.com/kanishka
- **Rima Patel** — MD/MS in Health Policy; advises early-stage startups, clinician entrepreneurs, and creators on GTM and compliance; global consulting experience across the US, LATAM, and India. https://samooh.com/rima
- **Ashita Achuthan** — Founder of Otto (an AI biographer); built Fantoons (AI-powered fan-fiction comics); co-founder of Women in Product; previously in product at Twitter, Amazon, and eBay. https://samooh.com/ashita
- **Apoorva Savant** — Senior product designer at Adyen; BITS Pilani and IIT Bombay IDC alumna; previously designed an eye-tracking interface for ALS patients. https://samooh.com/apoorva
- **Ajey Pai** — PhD candidate at Netherlands Cancer Institute and University of Amsterdam; building Epistemic Tools; developed AI algorithms for gastrointestinal disease detection at IIT Delhi. https://samooh.com/ajey
- **Parth Patel** — Co-founder of HUD (YC W25), an evaluation platform for Computer Use Agents; previously worked on AI/NLP, fintech, healthtech, and nuclear reactors. https://samooh.com/parth
- **Vinayak Mehta** — Staff engineer at Clarify; open-source contributor and speaker; previously at June (YC W21), Grofers, and SocialCops; based in Paris. https://samooh.com/vinayak
- **Astha Rattan** — Building Relay at Chargebee, a community for SaaS founders and operators; experienced across growth, product marketing, and community. https://samooh.com/astha
- **Vasundhara Kanoria** — Co-founder of Togethrly, an app for couples in long-distance relationships; lawyer and social scientist; UN experience; Ashoka Young India Fellow. https://samooh.com/vasundhara
- **Zaid Mukaddam** — Creator of Scira, an open-source AI search engine sponsored by Vercel and xAI; indie developer focused on UX and generative AI. https://samooh.com/zaid
- **Ankush Saxena** — Senior product UX designer at IKEA; previously at Tide, GoIbibo/MakeMyTrip, and Directi; co-founder of Broke Bibliophiles Bombay. https://samooh.com/ankush
- **Keya Vadgama** — Designer specializing in South Asian script typefaces and custom logotypes; released her first font Mango (a love letter to Gujarati script); previously at Plumb. https://samooh.com/keya
- **Karthik Mahadevan** — Founder and CEO of Envision; builds accessibility tools including Ally for people who are blind or have low vision; product design background from Delft University of Technology. https://samooh.com/karthik
- **Kunal Bhatia** — Product designer who breaks down complex systems to build better experiences; has built fintech, consumer, and healthcare products at Mercury, Finta, ZeroCarbonMA, GE Healthcare, and DocBox; based between Boston and New York City. https://samooh.com/kunal
- **Ishit Jain** — Co-founder of Sellerity, an AI-powered platform that transforms how sales teams train and perform; formerly a Senior Software Engineer at Google and Nutanix. https://samooh.com/ishit

- Community directory: https://samooh.com/community
- Apply to join: https://samooh.com/apply
